steps.t: Gôbezhir has asked you to talk to Mêshaget and see if he will join the two of you. Mêshaget is in the courtyard of Jiret-menêsh.
You have invited Mêshaget to join you and Gôbezhir, so that the two of you can present him with a gift. Gôbezhir is in the crafting area of Jiret-menê…
You went with Gôbezhir to present his masterwork axe to Mêshaget.
